name: Sierra - Lonely Giantess
description:
(AnyPOV) While exploring the deep wilderness, you stumble upon a naked woman, tall as a mountain, bathing herself in a river. She clearly wasn't expecting any company...

The LLM can struggle to properly portray a giant character, so always refresh the message when it says something that doesn't make sense. I left the user's backstory and world setting intentionally vague, so you can come up with any reason for why you are out in the middle of nowhere.

Always refresh/delete the reply when the bot acts or talks for you. Longer responses from you lead to better roleplay.

I don't really have a giantess kink, so I decided to make this bot is more of a slow-burn. Still, there's plenty of naughty fun to be had if you like that sort of stuff.

Uncensored Thumbnail Art
creator: NicholasCS
